signals.headline: Kevin Durant Injury Confirmed: Deep Bruise in Right Patellar Tendon, Status Uncertain for Suns-Thunder Game 2 | YES | HI
signals.raw:
Kevin Durant Injury Confirmed: Deep Bruise in Right Patellar Tendon, Status Uncertain for Suns-Thunder Game 2 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Kevin Durant's deep bruise from a practice collision last Wednesday has caused swelling and limited range of motion, making his participation in Game 2 (OKC leads 1-0) up in the air—potentially his first missed playoff game due to severity[1][2]. Rockets/Suns fa

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Payment Rail | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Payment Rail | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 15, Rakuten Wallet went live with XRP as both a listed asset and payment method, reaching 44 million Rakuten Pay users and 5 million merchant locations. Rakuten's 3 trillion loyalty points ($23 billion in circulation) can now convert to XRP.[1]

signals.headline: Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active with ~$1B AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active with ~$1B AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**
Six U.S. spot XRP ETFs are now live (Canary XRPC, Bitwise, Franklin Templeton, Grayscale, 21Shares, and Amplify) with combined assets under management of approximately $1 billion and around 787 million XRP locked in custody. Week-ending April 11 saw the strongest inflows ($119.6 million) since December.[1]

signals.headline: Note on Current Price Action:**
signals.raw:
Note on Current Price Action:**
XRP pulled back to $1.4278 by April 19, representing a 4% decline from the April 17 high but still 12.7% above the April 12 local low.[1] The token remains 22.4% below its 2026 opening price of $1.8392.[1]

signals.headline: Anthony Edwards Questionable for Timberwolves-Nuggets Game 2 Tonight | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Anthony Edwards Questionable for Timberwolves-Nuggets Game 2 Tonight | YES | MED confidence**  
Edwards scored 22 points in Game 1 (Nuggets won 120-101, now series 1-0 after Thunder 124-94 over MIN), but is questionable tonight due to an unspecified injury[1][2]. Nuggets' Nikola Jokic (22nd playoff triple-double) and Jamal Murray (30 pts, 16/16 FT) rallied for the win[2].

signals.headline: Elon Musk # Tweets April 14-21, 2026 Market Locked at 100% for 220-239 Range | YES (resolved/near-resolved) | HIGH confi
signals.raw:
Elon Musk # Tweets April 14-21, 2026 Market Locked at 100% for 220-239 Range | YES (resolved/near-resolved) | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X/Tweet market shows traders assigning **100% odds** to Elon Musk posting 220-239 tweets in the April 14-21 period, with massive **$12M volume**—indicating near-certainty or recent resolution based on real-time data as of April 20-21, 2026[2][3]
